title: Ed-Ready Course UX Architecture
summary: Course-first product and interface architecture for an educational lab platform, with clear publishing, adoption, permissions, and learner workflows.

logs.title: Built the course-first UX foundation
logs.details: Designed and implemented a clearer Ed-Ready workflow that separates lab creation, course building, publishing, adoption, assignment, and learner access.

logs.title: Aligned visibility and adoption rules
logs.details: Added private and public catalog structure with role-based permissions so public courses can be shared broadly while private courses remain inside their organization.

nextSteps: Refine the interface from testing feedback
Resolve remaining integration and lint issues
